lines.speaker: Bob Barter (herbs)
lines.text: Hello, chum, fancy buyin' some designer jewellry? They've come all the way from Ardougne! Most pukka!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Erm, no. I'm all set, thanks.

lines.speaker: Bob Barter (herbs)
lines.text: Okay, chum, would you like to show you the very latest potion prices?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Bob Barter (herbs)
lines.text: Why, I'm Bob! Your friendly seller of smashin' goods!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So what do you have to sell?

lines.speaker: Bob Barter (herbs)
lines.text: Oh, not much at the moment. Cuz, ya know, business being so well and cushie.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You don't really look like you're being so successful.

lines.speaker: Bob Barter (herbs)
lines.text: You plonka! It's all a show, innit! If I let people knows I'm in good business they'll want a share of the moolah!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You conveniently have a response for everything.

lines.speaker: Bob Barter (herbs)
lines.text: That's the Ardougne way, my son.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Can you show me the prices for potions?

lines.speaker: Bob Barter (herbs)
lines.text: Lets see what you have...

lines.speaker: Bob Barter (herbs)
lines.text: You're a bit short of inventory space.

lines.speaker: Bob Barter (herbs)
lines.text: You're a bit short of empty vessels or cash. Empty vials cost 5 coins each, cups 8 coins each, and anything else is 5 coins each.

lines.speaker: Bob Barter (herbs)
lines.text: There, I've done what I can, but you're a bit short of empty vessels or cash. Empty vials cost 5 coins each, cups 8 coins each, and anything else is 5 coins each.

lines.speaker: Bob Barter (herbs)
lines.text: There, all done.

lines.speaker: Bob Barter (herbs)
lines.text: Two plus two is four, minus one that's three...

lines.speaker: Bob Barter (herbs)
lines.text: There, all done.

lines.speaker: Bob Barter (herbs)
lines.text: I don't think you've got anything that I can decant.
